data.title: Knightscope Joins AUVSI to Advance Autonomous Systems Policy
data.description:
Knightscope Joins AUVSI to Advance Autonomous Systems Policy

Public Safety Innovator Schedules Town Hall to Review First Quarter 2025 Earnings

SUNNYVALE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--May 09, 2025--

Knightscope, Inc. , a leader in developing autonomous security robots and artificial intelligence technologies, announced today that it has joined the Association for Uncrewed Vehicle Systems International (AUVSI). AUVSI is the world's largest nonprofit organization devoted to the advancement of uncrewed systems and robotics, and Knightscope's new membership underscores the Company's commitment to national leadership in autonomous security innovation. By joining AUVSI, Knightscope stands alongside industry giants in shaping the future of autonomous systems policy in the United States of America.

This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250509583808/en/

AUVSI

Knightscope will take an active role in AUVSI's Cyber, Ground, and Defense Advocacy Committees as well as the newly created Robotics Subcommittee, which drive strategic policies and funding priorities for uncrewed systems across government and industry. A key policy development initiative is a focus on a National Robotics Strategy. Through these committees, Knightscope will contribute its real-world expertise in autonomous ground robotics and cybersecurity to inform national standards and legislation that enhance public safety and protect critical infrastructure. This strategic engagement not only amplifies Knightscope's voice in key policy discussions but also strengthens its influence in the federal sector, reinforcing the Company's role as a key stakeholder in the future of autonomous security and defense technologies.

"Knightscope has always championed innovation in the name of public safety, and joining AUVSI enables us to push that mission even further," said William Santana Li, chairman and chief executive officer of Knightscope. "We are proud to collaborate with other industry pioneers through AUVSI to accelerate the adoption of life-saving autonomous technologies, and we intend to help shape the policies that will make America safer and stronger in the years and decades to come."

Knightscope's overarching mission is to make the United States of America the safest country in the world. Every innovation the Company brings to market — from its Autonomous Security Robots that deter crime to its AI-driven detection systems that provide 24/7 situational awareness — serves this mission by enhancing national security and public safety. By infusing this mission-driven approach into forums like AUVSI, Knightscope aims to influence the broader adoption of technologies that protect the public and support those who safeguard our Nation.

TOWN HALL

Knightscope will host its First Quarter 2025 Earnings Town Hall on Wednesday, May 14, 2025, at 12pm PDT / 3pm EDT. Join us for an in-depth review of the Company's performance, progress, and outlook.

RSVP here to attend the live webinar and participate in the conversation on the future of security.

About Knightscope

Knightscope is transforming public safety with cutting-edge robotics and AI technologies. From autonomous security robots to advanced detection systems, Knightscope is committed to building safer communities where you live, work, study and visit. Our long-term ambition is bold but simple: to make the United States of America the safest country in the world. Learn more about us at www.knightscope.com.

Forward-Looking Statements

This press release contains "forward-looking statements" within the meaning of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995. Such forward-looking statements can be identified by the use of words such as "should," "may," "intends," "anticipates," "believes," "estimates," "projects," "forecasts," "expects," "plans," "proposes" and similar expressions. Forward-looking statements contained in this press release and other communications include, but are not limited to, statements about the Company's goals, profitability, growth, prospects, reduction of expenses, and outlook. Although Knightscope believes that the expectations reflected in these forward-looking statements are based on reasonable assumptions, there are a number of risks, uncertainties and other important factors that could cause actual results to differ materially from such forward-looking statements, including the factors discussed under the heading "Risk Factors" in Knightscope's Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2024, as updated by its other filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission. data.title: CRESUD S.A.C.I.F. y A. announces its results for the third quarter of Fiscal Year 2025 ended March 31, 2025
data.description:
CRESUD S.A.C.I.F. y A. announces its results for the third quarter of Fiscal Year 2025 ended March 31, 2025

PR Newswire

BUENOS AIRES, Argentina, May 9, 2025

BUENOS AIRES, Argentina, May 9, 2025 /PRNewswire/ — Cresud S.A.C.I.F. y A. (, BYMA: CRES), leading Argentine agricultural company, announces today its results for the third quarter of FY 2025 ended March 31, 2025.

HIGHLIGHTS

  • The net result for the nine-month period of the 2025 fiscal year recorded a profit of ARS 57,895 million, compared to a loss of ARS 39,987 million in the same period of 2024.
  • The adjusted EBITDA of the segments that make up the agricultural business was ARS 31,072 million, while the urban properties and investments business (through IRSA) recorded ARS 156,380 million.
  • The 2025 campaign progressed with a good level of rainfall in the region, despite some irregularity in frequency specially in Northern Argentina, with sustained commodity prices and stable input costs. We planted 300,000 hectares in the region and expect to produce approximately 867,000 tons of grains, 23% more than in the previous campaign.
  • Cattle activity in Argentina is developing with very good prices, margins, and production levels.
  • During the quarter and after the closing, the Argentine government announced two favorable measures for the agricultural sector. First, a temporary reduction, until June 30, 2025, in export duties for soybeans, from 33% to 26%, and for wheat and corn, from 12% to 9.5%, with a positive impact on available and future grain prices. Second, the partial elimination of capital controls, with a direct impact on the convergence of exchange rates.
  • During the nine-month period of the 2025 fiscal year, we sold a portion of the "Los Pozos" farm in Argentina for USD 2.2 million, and our subsidiary BrasilAgro sold a portion of "Alto Taquari" farm for BRL 189.4 million.

  • Revenue rose 47.1% to $1.54 million from a year ago; analysts expected $1.87 million.

  • NextNav Inc's reported EPS for the quarter was a loss of 45 cents​.

  • NextNav Inc shares had risen by 14.5% this quarter and lost 10.5% so far this year.

FORECAST CHANGES

Seattle, Washington , May 09, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) —

Sunrise Pact Investment Alliance has unveiled a new intelligent market engine designed to enhance the precision, speed, and efficiency of investment operations across global markets. Built with reference to Alaric Wainwright’s NeuroGrid AI framework, the engine consolidates real-time data capture, adaptive signal generation, and automated execution into a unified solution for institutional investors and financial strategists.

 

The system launch comes as part of a broader strategic expansion that positions Sunrise Pact Investment Alliance at the forefront of intelligent trading solutions. This new engine introduces a robust core for high-frequency data interpretation, enabling trading strategies to evolve with market volatility and macroeconomic shifts. By emphasizing intelligent automation and infrastructure scalability, the Alliance aims to redefine how modern finance interacts with risk and opportunity.

Key system components include:

Live Signal Core – Continuously tracks global liquidity and asset behavior, issuing precision-based trade signals.

Execution Synchronizer – Ensures seamless deployment of strategies across asset classes, aligned with market timing indicators.

Risk Containment Layer – Features predictive alerting and threshold-adjusted protection systems to mitigate sudden drawdowns.

Tactical Forecast Engine – Provides asset-specific outlooks based on real-time economic, sectoral, and behavioral modeling.

This platform reflects the evolving design philosophy of NeuroGrid AI, which has influenced many of Sunrise Pact Investment Alliance’s recent product releases. While this new system is not a direct successor, it builds upon NeuroGrid AI’s emphasis on dynamic learning, decentralized decision processes, and investor accessibility.

A senior technology advisor from the Alliance noted, “This engine is built to anticipate rather than react. It allows analysts, portfolio managers, and execution desks to operate with greater confidence and strategic range.”

The rollout will occur in phases, beginning with select financial partners and research collaborators. Educational materials, training simulations, and onboarding workshops will accompany the deployment to ensure performance alignment and regulatory compatibility.

As part of its continued growth, Sunrise Pact Investment Alliance is also reinforcing its partnerships with digital infrastructure providers to expand regional access and performance latency controls. The company reaffirms its commitment to innovation through integrated development roadmaps, ethical AI adoption, and cross-border collaboration.

data.title: Dunav, Impol Seval help Belgrade blue-chip index end higher
data.description:
BELGRADE (Serbia), May 9 (SeeNews) - The blue-chip BELEX15 index of the Belgrade Stock Exchange closed higher for a third consecutive day on Friday, thanks to the rising share price of insurer Dunav Osiguranje [BEL:DNOS] and aluminium rolling mill Impol Seval [BEL:IMPL], bourse data showed.

BELEX15 added 0.05% to close at 1,143.30 points on Friday after advancing 0.31% on Thursday.

Dunav's stock price rose 0.29% to 1,361 dinars at close, generating the single largest turnover of 1.2 million dinars for the day. Impol Seval edged up 0.01% to close at 7,100 dinars as 112 stocks changed hands, posting the second largest turnover of 795,200 dinars.

The only other blue chip that traded on Friday was Aerodrom Nikola Tesla [BEL:AERO], which ended flat at 2,184 dinars at close on a volume of three traded stocks.

The broader BELEXline, a free-float market capitalisation-weighted index, advanced by 0.02%, closing at 2,584.04 points, after adding 0.27% on Thursday.

The total turnover on the Belgrade bourse plunged to 4.2 million dinars ($38,000/34,000 euro) on Friday from 54.8 million dinars on Thursday when trading in government paper contributing 54.3 million dinars of the total. On Friday, trading in government securities generated 1.5 million dinars.

(1 euro = 117.215 dinars)

(“Mobio” or the “Company”) ispleased to announce a strategic partnership between its flagship homeservices brand You MoveMe (YouMoveMe.com) and Avoca, a provider ofAI-powered call agents, with the goal to improve the customerexperience and streamline communications.

Integration of Avoca’s intelligent voice agents willallow on-the-ground teams to focus on execution, enhancingresponsiveness and laying the groundwork for scalable servicedelivery. This collaboration demonstrates Mobio’s commitment tointegrating cutting-edge technology into its portfolio companies todeliver faster, more efficient, and personalized services.

Central to this initiative is the integration ofAvoca’s platform with MoveRight (MoveRight.app), the proprietary CRM and operations platformdeveloped by KarveIT, in which You Move Me holds a strategic 39.2%ownership stake. MoveRight is a comprehensive, cloud-based solutiondesigned specifically for the moving industry, offering features suchas dynamic reporting, automated multichannel customer communications, and an intuitive dispatch system. Thisintegration enables real-time communication between customers, fieldteams, and operations—ensuring that tasks are routed intelligentlyand services are delivered with speed and accuracy.

“Avoca stood out from the many AI tools weevaluated,” said Prabh Heer, VP of Operations at Mobio TechnologiesInc. and CEO of Karve IT. “We understand that there is an increasingnumber of AI solutions and a variety of use cases in all aspects ofour operations. With that in mind, it was important for us to choose along-term partner with a proven track record. What set Avoca apart wastheir flexibility to hit the ground running and innovate alongside us.With You Move Me being a tech-first franchisor in the moving industry,it provides Avoca the opportunity to grow with us as well as help usin our efforts to be a more efficient and well-regarded moving companyin North America. Through consistent testing and strategy execution,we are confident that the partnership between You Move Me and Avocawill provide value and support each other’s businesses as theygrow.”

Jeff Sims, Managing Director ofYou Move Me,emphasized the impact on the customerjourney: “At You MoveMe, innovation is what sets us apart in our efforts to make every move thebest move ever for our customers and teammates—it's at the heart ofhow we serve our customers. Our partnership with Avoca in advancing AItechnology represents a step forward inredefining the moving experience. From smarterscheduling to real-time updates and predictive service personalization,this collaboration allows us to deliver faster, friendlier, and more seamlessmoves than before. We're proud to leadthe way in using technologyto make moving easier—and more enjoyable—for our customers andteams.”

Vladislav Pasko, Chief FinancialOfficer at Mobio Technologies, expressed his enthusiasm for the partnership, emphasizinghow Avoca’s integration with MoveRightwill drive operationalefficiencies and create opportunities forfuture AI advancements across Mobio’s portfolio of brands. “I am very excitedfor the You Move Mebrand to take the lead in driving technological change within the movingindustry with this new partnership. I believe that Avoca’s unwavering determination toinnovate and their ability to build an integration with ourCRM system MoveRight will create efficiencyimprovements throughout the whole organization and will build a pathway ofAI use casesfor the future development of Mobio brands.”

The partnership between You Move Me, Avoca, and Karve reflects abroader strategy to transform service businesses by embeddingintelligence at every touchpoint—from the first phone call to thefinal handshake. As the pilot progresses, Mobio anticipates furtherintegration of AI solutions into its growing portfolio of home servicebrands, driving innovation and delivering consistent, valuableexperiences at scale.

About You Move Me

You Move Me(YouMoveMe.com),legally known as TracksuitMovers Inc., is revolutionizing the local andlong-distance moving industry. We aim to be more than just a movingcompany — we’re your moving partner, dedicated to making yourmoving day stress-free, and maybe even fun. With locations acrossNorth America, our mission is to move people, not just theirboxes, and ensure they have the #BestMoveEver.You Move Me is part of the Mobio Brands portfolio.

About Mobio Technologies Inc.

Mobio Technologies Inc. (MobioBrands.com), a TSX Venture
Exchange-listed company , is actively assembling a leading
portfolio of home service brands, united by a dedication to quality,
integrity, and exceptional customer experiences. As a public company,
Mobio is strategically investing in both the home services and
technology sectors, with the goal of providing homeowners with a
comprehensive network of trusted providers for every aspect of home
care and improvement.

For additional information, please contact:

Laurie Baggio,CEO

Tel: 604-805-7498

Email: Investors@MobioBrands.com

Other than statements of historical fact, allstatements included in this news release, including, withoutlimitation, statements regarding future plans and objectives of Mobio,are forward-looking statements that involve various risks anduncertainties. Those filings can be found on the Internet at: www.sedarplus.ca.
